t1.prompt: Certo! Dimmi pure, dove devi andare?
t1.promptTranslation: CHAIR-toh! DEEM-mee POO-reh, DOH-veh DEH-vee an-DAH-reh? — Of course! Tell me, where do you need to go?

t2.prompt: La stazione non è lontana. Vai sempre dritto per circa duecento metri, superi la piazza principale con la fontana e poi giri a sinistra. La vedrai subito.
t2.promptTranslation: Lah stah-TSYOH-neh non eh lon-TAH-nah. Vahy SEM-preh DREET-toh per CHEER-kah doo-eh-CHEN-toh MEH-tree, SOO-peh-ree lah PYAT-tsah preen-chee-PAH-leh kon lah fon-TAH-nah eh poy JEE-ree ah see-NEES-trah. Lah veh-DRAI SOO-bee-toh. — The station isn't far. Go straight for about two hundred meters, pass the main square with the fountain, and then turn left. You'll see it immediately.

t3.prompt: C'è il Museo Civico, non molto lontano. Ti consiglio di prendere il tram numero 1. La fermata è dietro l'angolo, di fronte alla chiesa antica. Scendi alla terza fermata, si chiama 'Porta Romana'.
t3.promptTranslation: Cheh eel moo-ZEH-oh CHEE-vee-koh, non MOL-toh lon-TAH-noh. Tee kon-SEE-lyoh dee PREN-deh-reh eel tram NOO-meh-roh OO-noh. Lah fer-MAH-tah eh DYET-roh LAN-go-loh, dee FRON-teh ah-llah KEE-eh-zah an-TEE-kah. SHEN-dee ah-llah TER-tsah fer-MAH-tah, see KYA-mah 'POR-tah roh-MAH-nah'. — There's the Civic Museum, not far. I recommend taking tram number 1. The stop is around the corner, in front of the old church. Get off at the third stop, it's called 'Porta Romana'.

t4.prompt: C'è una farmacia aperta 24 ore su 24 vicino all'ospedale. Devi prendere la terza strada a destra e proseguire per un isolato. La troverai sul lato sinistro.
t4.promptTranslation: Cheh OO-nah far-mah-CHEE-ah ah-PER-tah venti-QUAHT-troh OH-reh soo venti-QUAHT-troh vee-CHEE-noh ah-llohs-peh-DAH-leh. DEH-vee PREN-deh-reh lah TER-tsah STRAH-dah ah DES-trah eh proh-seh-GWEE-reh per oon ee-zoh-LAH-toh. Lah troh-veh-RAI sool LAH-toh see-NEES-troh. — There's a 24-hour pharmacy near the hospital. You need to take the third street on the right and go straight for one block. You'll find it on the left side.

t4b.prompt: L'ospedale è proprio lì, sulla stessa via della farmacia, un po' più avanti. È un edificio grande, non puoi sbagliare.
t4b.promptTranslation: Loh-speh-DAH-leh eh PRO-pryoh lee, SOO-llah STES-sah VEE-ah DEH-llah far-mah-CHEE-ah, oon poh pyoo ah-VAN-tee. Eh oon eh-dee-FEE-choh GRAN-deh, non pwoy zba-LYAH-reh. — The hospital is right there, on the same street as the pharmacy, a little further on. It's a large building, you can't miss it.

t5.prompt: Per l'autobus o il tram, puoi comprare i biglietti in qualsiasi tabaccheria o edicola. Ce n'è una proprio qui di fronte, accanto al bar.
t5.promptTranslation: Per LOW-toh-boos oh eel tram, pwoy kom-PRAH-reh ee bee-LYET-tee een kwal-SYAH-zee tah-bak-keh-REE-ah oh eh-DEE-koh-lah. Cheh neh OO-nah PRO-pryoh kwee dee FRON-teh, ah-KAN-toh al bar. — For the bus or tram, you can buy tickets in any tobacconist or newsstand. There's one right here in front, next to the bar.

t-repeat.prompt: Scusa, potresti ripetere per favore? Non ho capito bene.
t-repeat.promptTranslation: SKOO-zah, poh-TRES-tee ree-PEH-teh-reh per fah-VOH-reh? Non oh kah-PEE-toh BEH-neh. — Excuse me, could you please repeat? I didn't understand well.

t-end.prompt: Figurati! Buona giornata e buon proseguimento!
t-end.promptTranslation: Fee-goo-RAH-tee! BWOH-nah jor-NAH-tah eh bwon proh-seh-GWEE-men-toh! — You're welcome! Have a good day and good journey!
